description: Extracts metadata directly from book files (EPUB, CBZ, CBR, PDF, audiobooks) and enriches via online APIs: Hardcover, Google Books, OpenLibrary. No Calibre, Audiobookshelf, or Komga dependencies required.
name: BookEnhancers
overview: Unified ebook, audiobook, and comic metadata enrichment plugin. Parses files directly and cascades online lookups for the best available metadata.

versions.changelog: v0.1.4.0 - Main tab (renamed from Settings, now first); Plugin Info now populates correctly; Libraries filtered to book-type only; [Authorize] on ConfigController.
v0.1.3.0 - Config page enhancements: format priority reordering, file type filters, copy/move mode, test API key buttons, plugin info & reset.
v0.1.2.0 - Triggerable scheduled tasks (Ingestion Scan, Grouping Process, Full Maintenance) with per-task log files; Full Maintenance auto-schedules via AutoScanIntervalMinutes.
v0.1.1.0 - Format grouping (single entry per title by ISBN); Managed source directories with file ingestion/moving; Format priority (EPUB > MOBI > PDF > others)
v0.1.0.0 - Alpha release. File metadata extraction (EPUB, CBZ/CBR/CB7, PDF, audio). Online enrichment via Hardcover, Google Books, OpenLibrary. Unified metadata provider.
